## Summary

<!-- Short description of the change and why it is needed. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation / DX
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Internal / maintenance (CI, tooling, refactor without behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
- [ ] **Tests:** `composer test` passes locally.
- [ ] **Style:** `composer run lint` passes (or I ran `composer run format`).
- [ ] **Static analysis:** `composer run analyse` passes (if PHP code changed under `src/`).
- [ ] **Docs:** README / `CHANGELOG.md` updated when user-facing behavior or installation steps change.
- [ ] **Breaking changes:** Described in `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` with migration notes if applicable.
